docs.title: Color operators
docs.text:
Select strokes and change its color using different operators.

For all operators you will find options in the Adjust Last Operation panel in the left bottom corner of 3d View.

docs.title: Apply
docs.text:
Simply applies current brush color onto selected strokes.

Apply color for fills or outlines only

docs.title: "New Palette" Popup
docs.text:
You can create new empty palette, create palette based on current visible grease pencil image or import any palette from other .blend file.

Example of how Create New Palette from Current Frame works:

docs.title: Show Swatches Button
docs.text:
With this button you can switch on/off palette swatches in 3d View

Use this swatches to change current brush color when in Paint mode or to fast change selected stroke colors when in Edit mode.

docs.title: Arrange
docs.text: Arrange strokes in classic way, to change their order (works only in 2D Layers mode)

docs.title: Stroke operators
docs.text: Additional stroke operators, in Edit mode they works on selected strokes, in other modes works on last drawn stroke (it makes life easier when you want to change last drawn stroke without going into Edit mode)

docs.title: Isolate
docs.text: Isolates strokes into new Grease Pencil object

docs.title: Simplify
docs.text: Makes Simplify and Smooth operator on stroke to make it more regular, with option to close stroke. This prepres stroke for better sculpting.
